title: Relationship between genetic divergence and phenotypic stability in chickpea
abstract: In this investigation, by and large, genotypes included in the same cluster had identiea means but the linear responses were not the same. However, genotypes included in the same cluster had almost identical non-linear responses. Therefore, grouping of material into different clusters based on regression analysis was found to be reliable as that of Mahalanobis' D2 Statistic
publication: Indian Journal of Genetics and Plant Breeding
